channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price rises 4.2% over weekend
item.description: Chainlink (LINK) joined Ethereum (ETH) as a top performer, up 4.1% since Friday....

item.description: The upgrade has been in development for about two years and is designed to make it easier to use Aave for a wider range of lending and borrowing activities....

item.title: Estonian hospital sends patient home with other peoples’ health data
item.description: Märten Hallismaa reports: A person who underwent X-ray imaging at West Tallinn Central Hospital (LTKH) was sent home with a USB drive that also contained the personal and health data of other patients...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Bitcoin rises as Trump says U.S. in talks with 'new regime' in Iran, threatens oil infrastructure if deal fails

item.title: How Organizations Can Use Mistakes to Level Up Their Security Programs
item.description: Organizations repeatedly expose ports, reuse passwords, and skip patches, creating security gaps that attackers exploit for breaches. An industry veteran outlines ways to fix these common mistakes....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: AI-Powered Dependency Decisions Introduce, Ignore Security Bugs
item.description: AI models often hallucinate or make costly mistakes when tasked with recommending software versions, upgrade paths, and security fixes — leading to significant technical debt....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: [Webinar] Stop Guessing. Learn to Validate Your Defenses Against Real Attacks
item.description: Most teams have security tools in place. Alerts are firing, dashboards look clean, threat intel is flowing in. On the surface, everything feels under control. But one question usually stays unanswered...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Claude Extension Flaw Enabled Zero-Click XSS Prompt Injection via Any Website
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a vulnerability in Anthropic's Claude Google Chrome Extension that could have been exploited to trigger malicious prompts simply by visiting a web page. The fl...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Intermediaries Driving Global Spyware Market Expansion
item.description: Third-party resellers and brokers foil transparency efforts and allow spyware to spread despite government restrictions, a study finds....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Masters of Imitation: How Hackers and Art Forgers Perfect the Art of Deception
item.description: Unmasking impostors is something the art world has faced for decades, and there are valuable lessons from the works of Elmyr de Hory that can apply to the world of defensive cybersecurity. During the ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: PQC Push, AI Vuln Hunting, Pirated Traps, Phishing Kits & 20 More Stories
item.description: Some weeks in security feel loud. This one feels sneaky. Less big dramatic fireworks, more of that slow creeping sense that too many people are getting way too comfortable abusing things they probably...

item.title: Coruna iOS Kit Reuses 2023 Triangulation Exploit Code in Recent Mass Attacks
item.description: The kernel exploit for two security vulnerabilities used in the recently uncovered Apple iOS exploit kit known as Coruna is an updated version of the same exploit that was used in the Operation Triang...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Fenbushi co-founder offers bounty to recover $42M lost in 2022 hack
item.description: Investigators have frozen about $1.2 million as efforts continue to trace funds lost in a wallet breach linked to a seed phrase compromise....
